title: Fix order history and delivery schedule errors, add delivery date display

requirements.text: Debug and fix the errors occurring in the order history feature to ensure it correctly fetches and displays customer order data without crashes or error states

quotes: oder history and delivery scheule is giving an error

acceptanceCriteria: Order history page loads without errors
Customer orders are fetched successfully from the backend
Order history displays all past orders with product, quantity, date, and status

requirements.text: Debug and fix the errors occurring in the delivery schedule feature to ensure it correctly fetches and displays delivery information without crashes or error states

quotes: oder history and delivery scheule is giving an error

acceptanceCriteria: Delivery schedule page loads without errors
Delivery information is fetched successfully from the backend
Delivery schedule displays all pending deliveries with order details

requirements.text: Add delivery date field to the delivery schedule display, showing when each order is scheduled for delivery

quotes: please add delivery date in delivery schedule

acceptanceCriteria: Delivery date is stored in the backend Delivery type
Delivery date is displayed for each delivery in the delivery schedule
Date is formatted in a user-friendly format (e.g., 'January 15, 2024' or 'DD/MM/YYYY')

constraints: Do not modify immutable frontend paths (useInternetIdentity.ts, useActor.ts, main.tsx, components/ui)
Preserve existing WhatsApp integration and PhonePe QR code functionality
nonGoals: Redesigning the UI layout of order history or delivery schedule pages
Adding new order statuses beyond placed/delivered/canceled
Implementing automated delivery date scheduling logic
